name_en: Original leather 5BG291, New arrival vintage tote bag, made with new soft lambskin leather, soft and premium texture. Inspired by Miu's archival design, this Aventure Nappa leather bag has a restructured, lighter form with a fresh personality. Features embossed letter logo, vintage gold hardware, linen blend lining, zip pocket and patch pocket. Long handle suitable for hand or shoulder carry. Dimensions: 31X40X13CM
